description: AI Trend Bucket Taxonomy - Categories for holistic signal analysis

buckets.name: Foundation Models & LLMs
buckets.description: Large language models, foundation models, and core AI architectures

buckets.name: RAG & Retrieval Infrastructure
buckets.description: Retrieval-augmented generation, vector databases, embeddings, and search

buckets.name: Agent Frameworks & Orchestration
buckets.description: AI agents, multi-agent systems, tool use, and orchestration frameworks

buckets.name: LLM Serving & Inference Optimization
buckets.description: Model serving, inference optimization, quantization, and deployment

buckets.name: Fine-tuning & Training
buckets.description: Model fine-tuning, PEFT, LoRA, RLHF, and training infrastructure

buckets.name: Synthetic Data & Evaluation
buckets.description: Synthetic data generation, model evaluation, benchmarks, and testing

buckets.name: AI for Code & Dev Tools
buckets.description: Code generation, code assistants, IDE tools, and developer productivity

buckets.name: Vision & Multimodal AI
buckets.description: Computer vision, image generation, video AI, and multimodal models

buckets.name: Speech & Audio AI
buckets.description: Speech recognition, text-to-speech, audio processing, and voice AI

buckets.name: Robotics & Embodied AI
buckets.description: Robotics, embodied AI, physical AI, and autonomous systems

buckets.name: Autonomous Vehicles & Mobility
buckets.description: Self-driving cars, autonomous vehicles, and mobility AI

buckets.name: AI Security & Safety
buckets.description: AI security, model safety, alignment, red teaming, and governance

buckets.name: AI Infrastructure & Compute
buckets.description: GPU infrastructure, cloud AI, training clusters, and compute optimization

buckets.name: AI Chips & Hardware
buckets.description: AI accelerators, custom chips, edge AI hardware, and specialized processors

buckets.name: AI for Healthcare & Biotech
buckets.description: Medical AI, drug discovery, diagnostics, and healthcare applications

buckets.name: AI for Finance & Trading
buckets.description: Financial AI, trading algorithms, fraud detection, and fintech

buckets.name: Enterprise AI & Automation
buckets.description: Enterprise AI platforms, workflow automation, and business applications

buckets.name: AI for Customer Experience
buckets.description: Chatbots, customer service AI, conversational AI, and CX platforms

buckets.name: AI for Creative & Media
buckets.description: Creative AI, content generation, media production, and entertainment

buckets.name: AI for Legal & Compliance
buckets.description: Legal AI, contract analysis, compliance automation, and regulatory tech

buckets.name: AI for Education & Learning
buckets.description: Educational AI, tutoring, learning platforms, and edtech

buckets.name: AI-Powered Search & Discovery
buckets.description: AI search engines, knowledge discovery, and information retrieval

buckets.name: AI Data Infrastructure
buckets.description: Data labeling, data pipelines, feature stores, and data management for AI

buckets.name: AI Observability & Monitoring
buckets.description: LLM observability, model monitoring, debugging, and analytics

buckets.name: Open Source AI Movement
buckets.description: Open source models, open weights, community-driven AI development

buckets.name: Consumer AI Assistants
buckets.description: General-purpose consumer AI assistants, companions, and chat apps with weak moats
buckets.segment_notes: Hype-heavy, weak differentiation, capital often leads substance

buckets.name: Embedded & Vertical Assistants
buckets.description: Workflow-embedded AI assistants, vertical copilots, and OS-level integrations
buckets.segment_notes: Real value creation, slower hype, stronger moats

buckets.name: AI for Gaming & Simulation
buckets.description: Game AI, NPC behavior, procedural generation, and game development

buckets.name: AI for Climate & Sustainability
buckets.description: Climate AI, sustainability, energy optimization, and environmental applications

buckets.name: AI for Scientific Discovery
buckets.description: Scientific AI, materials discovery, protein folding, and research acceleration

buckets.name: AI for Defense & Government
buckets.description: Defense AI, government applications, and public sector AI

lifecycle_states.name: Emerging-Technical
lifecycle_states.description: High technical momentum, limited capital validation

alert_types.name: Alpha Zone (Hidden Gems)
alert_types.description: High technical momentum, low capital - potential early opportunity

alert_types.name: Hype Zone (Vaporware)
alert_types.description: High capital, low technical - money chasing story

alert_types.name: Enterprise Pull
alert_types.description: Rising enterprise offensive signals - adoption wave coming

alert_types.name: Disruption Pressure
alert_types.description: Defensive enterprise signals spiking - incumbents scared

alert_types.name: Rotation/Maturation
alert_types.description: Technical decelerating, capital consolidating - market maturing
